title: pachad #6342
definition:
1) to fear, tremble, revere, dread, be in awe or dread
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to be in dread
        1a2) to be in awe
    1b) (Piel) to be in great dread
    1c) (Hiphil) to cause to dread
nasbUsage:

    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to be in dread
        1a2) to be in awe
    1b) (Piel) to be in great dread
    1c) (Hiphil) to cause to dread

    NASB:  to dread, be in dread or in awe
